name: Sarpa
description: Makes sweeping cuts punctuated by bursts of heavy gunfire.

components.name: Akstiletto
components.description: These diminutive rapid-fire Stiletto machine-pistols are just the right size to be akimbo style without sacrificing accuracy.

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.description:
Carbon steel plates used to reinforce Grineer armor.

Location: Venus, Phobos, Ceres, Jupiter, Pluto, and Sedna.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: These diminutive rapid-fire Stiletto machine-pistols are just the right size to be akimbo style without sacrificing accuracy.

components.name: Forma
components.description: This shape-altering component is fundamental to Orokin construction. Allows you to change the polarity of a mod slot on a Warframe, Companions or Weapon and then resets their affinity to Unranked. This can only be used on max Rank Warframes, Companions and Weapons.

components.name: Gallium
components.description:
Soft metal used in microelectronics and energy weapons.

Location: Mars and Uranus

components.name: Salvage
components.description:
High value metals collected from war salvage.

Location: Mars, Jupiter, and Sedna

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Makes sweeping cuts punctuated by bursts of heavy gunfire.

components.name: Control Module
components.description:
Autonomy processor for Robotics. A Corpus design.

Location: Europa, Neptune, and the Void

components.name: Cryotic
components.description:
Usually found in extreme sub-zero environments, Cryotic instantly freezes anything it contacts.

Location: Excavation Missions on Venus, Earth, Phobos, Europa, and Neptune

components.name: Plastids
components.description:
A disgusting nanite-infested tissue mass.

Location: Phobos, Saturn, Uranus, Pluto, and Eris

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Update 27.2.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed ugly and busted blast FX for the Sarpa, Redeemer, and Redeemer Prime.

patchlogs.name: Update 26: The Old Blood
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed inability to jump after firing the Sarpa and falling off an edge.

patchlogs.name: Saint of Altra: Update 25.7.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a flickering issue with the Sarpa Day of the Dead Skin.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Hotfix 25.2.1
patchlogs.changes: Adjusted Gunblade holster position on Wisp for the Sarpa.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.2.7 + 24.2.7.1
patchlogs.changes: Toned down the firing FX on the Sarpa.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Update 22.14.0
patchlogs.changes: Fixed getting knocked down while firing a Gunblade weapon (Sarpa, Redeemer, etc) resulting in the weapon no longer firing rounds and the firing audio being incorrect.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Hotfix 22.13.2
patchlogs.changes: Updated and fixed some Sarpa firing sounds.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Hotfix 22.12.1
patchlogs.changes: Updated sounds to the Redeemer and Sarpa.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.9.0
patchlogs.changes: Sarpa and Redeemer trace distance reduced to 300m to match the rest of the non-sniper weapons.

patchlogs.name: Update 21: Chains of Harrow
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed issues with successfully chaining the Samba Slash Combo when using the Sarpa with Bullet Dance.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Update 20.4.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Sarpa not firing in bursts with the Bullet Dance Stance equipped.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Update 19.7.0
patchlogs.changes: Reduced the firing sounds of the Redeemer and Sarpa when fired by other players.

patchlogs.name: The Index Preview
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Sarpa not firing when equipped with the Bullet Dance stance Mod.

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove: U4+4.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Sarpa sometimes firing "blanks" with Bullet Dance or blank stance.
